text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 70 

MDCR_C_SNP_MOS 

LABEL: Medicare-Medicaid Chronic Conditions Special Needs Plan (C-SNP) Months 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the number of months during the year that the beneficiary was enrolled in a Medicare 
Special Needs Plan (SNP) for a chronic condition. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MBSF (derived) 

VALUES: 0–12, or null/missing (if no Medicare enrollment) 

COMMENT: CCW creates this variable by linking the
